title: Add junk journal Ai to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Scrapbooking, minus the glue
gist.blurb: Junk Journal AI just landed in the community showcase. Generate printable collage layouts and mixed-media elements without getting your fingers sticky.
gist.summary: Added Junk Journal AI to the community app showcase, a tool for generating printable, collage-style layouts for scrapbooking.
gist.impact: Creators can now easily generate custom mixed-media elements and journal pages for their physical or digital scrapbooking projects.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about a junk journaling and scrapbooking app. The visual should feature Polly the bee doing arts and crafts, surrounded by paper scraps, photos, and a scrapbook, representing the collage and mixed-media aspect.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, sitting at a wooden desk making a scrapbook collage. Scattered around are pixelated vintage photos, paper scraps, and a glue stick. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
